summary: Core library (PrLabelAssigner.ps1) is well-designed with clear functions and documentation. Critical issues: (1) Actions pinned only to @v4 tag, not full SHA (security best practice). (2) Workflow has 5 nearly-identical scenario steps (lines 40-113) that duplicate logic—should be factored into a loop or parameterized test fixture. (3) Run-Tests.ps1 hardcodes expected values in hashtable; adding test cases requires editing multiple files. (4) No preflight checks for act/docker availability. Modularity and maintainability are poor due to tight coupling of test data to workflow YAML structure.
